title: Vallydia Ingredient-Evidence Register
subtitle: Evidence-graded cosmetic & research ingredients with DOI-verified citations
description:
An open, evidence-graded reference dataset of 85 cosmetic and research ingredients (peptides, small molecules, proteins, blends).

Most ingredient databases tell you what a compound is. This one tells you how good the evidence actually is, outcome by outcome, and says so honestly when the answer is "untested" or "tested and failed".

What is inside:
- Per-outcome A-F evidence grades (456 graded outcome rows). A compound can be B for one outcome and F for another. Grades of null are deliberate: those rows are not efficacy claims (safety, skin penetration).
- DOI-verified citations (125 across 51 compounds), joined back to the source text.
- Machine-readable cosmetic-claims maps (246 rows): for each cosmetic ingredient, the claims that may be made and the claims that must NOT be. Directly usable for automated claim checking.
- Legal status by region (INT/EU/US/UK) and WADA prohibited status.
- Chemical identifiers (CAS, PubChem CID, InChIKey, SMILES) with explicit confidence and provenance. 21 compounds are blank on purpose: blends and multi-component biologics have no single structure, and a fabricated identifier would be worse than none.

Scope: appearance and evidence only. The dataset contains no dosing, no administration information and no commerce data, by design. Research and injectable compounds are included as reference entries with their honest grades and legal status, never framed as usable or obtainable.

This is not medical advice. The grades are Vallydia's own evidence assessment, not third-party certification (reviewer_status is 'unassigned' on every row, and the dataset says so).

Attribution: Data: Vallydia Ingredient-Evidence Register (https://vallydia.com), CC-BY-4.0.

Cite this dataset: DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21364453 (concept DOI — always resolves to the latest version).
Source repository: https://github.com/yamius/ingredient-evidence-register
Landing page: https://vallydia.com/data

This Kaggle mirror carries the tabular layer and the documentation. The image layer (RDKit-rendered structures and per-outcome grade cards) and the Parquet mirrors live in the source repository and on Hugging Face.

resources.description: One row per compound (85): scalar core plus pipe-joined lists.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Unique id and join key (e.g. ghk-cu).

fields.name: name
fields.description: The graded name, always a nonproprietary one: the INCI name for a cosmetic ingredient, the INN for a drug. A grade assesses a substance, so it never hangs on a supplier's trademark — those live in trade_names.

fields.name: inci_name
fields.description: INCI name (cosmetic ingredient glossary); blank where not a cosmetic ingredient.

fields.name: inn
fields.description: International Nonproprietary Name (WHO) for drug substances; blank where none exists.

fields.name: trade_names
fields.description: Pipe-joined trademarked/supplier names for the same substance (e.g. Matrixyl for Palmitoyl Pentapeptide-4). Reference only.

fields.name: compound_class
fields.description: peptide | small_molecule | protein | blend | polysaccharide.

fields.name: overall_grade
fields.description: A-F summary of the leading application; empty if unassigned.

fields.name: is_cosmetic
fields.description: Lawful cosmetic ingredient in at least one form.

fields.name: wada_prohibited
fields.description: On the WADA prohibited list.

fields.name: n_outcomes
fields.description: Number of graded outcome rows.

fields.name: best_outcome_grade
fields.description: Best non-null outcome grade; nulls ignored.

fields.name: worst_outcome_grade
fields.description: Worst non-null outcome grade; nulls ignored, never treated as F.

fields.name: synonyms
fields.description: Pipe-joined alternative names, including INCI names.

fields.name: function_tags
fields.description: Pipe-joined functional tags.

fields.name: related
fields.description: Pipe-joined slugs of related compounds.

fields.name: regions
fields.description: Pipe-joined regions present in legal_status.

fields.name: n_sources
fields.description: Count of cited sources.

fields.name: n_doi_verified
fields.description: Count of citations with a verified DOI; 0 = a reported gap, not an error.

fields.name: last_updated
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD the register entry was last revised.

fields.name: in_brief
fields.description: Plain-language summary.

fields.name: url
fields.description: Canonical source page on vallydia.com.

fields.name: structure_image
fields.description: Path to the structure image, or empty.

fields.name: grade_card_image
fields.description: Path to the per-outcome evidence-grade card image in the source repository.

resources.description: One row per compound x outcome (456). The analytical heart of the dataset.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Join key.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The graded name, denormalized: nonproprietary (INCI/INN), never a trademark.

fields.name: compound_class
fields.description: Compound class (denormalized).

fields.name: outcome
fields.description: The specific claim being graded.

fields.name: grade
fields.description: A-F, or empty for the 97 rows that are not efficacy claims (safety, penetration). Do not coerce empty to F.

fields.name: base
fields.description: The evidence base the grade rests on.

fields.name: effect
fields.description: What the evidence reports.

fields.name: caveat
fields.description: Why the grade is not higher.

resources.description: One row per compound x region (132).

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Join key.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The graded name, denormalized: nonproprietary (INCI/INN), never a trademark.

fields.name: region
fields.description: INT | EU | US | UK.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Short status label.

fields.name: note
fields.description: Long-form regulatory detail. Ages; check last_updated.

resources.description: DOI provenance table (125 rows across 51 compounds).

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Join key.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The graded name, denormalized: nonproprietary (INCI/INN), never a trademark.

fields.name: source_index
fields.description: 0-based index into that compound's sources list.

fields.name: source_text
fields.description: The free-text citation, resolved from sources[source_index].

fields.name: doi
fields.description: DOI of the cited work.

fields.name: resolved
fields.description: Resolution confidence, e.g. high.

fields.name: verified_title
fields.description: Title as returned by the resolver.

resources.description: The citations table cross-linked to OpenAlex and Semantic Scholar (citation counts, open-access links).

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Join key.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The graded name, denormalized: nonproprietary (INCI/INN), never a trademark.

fields.name: source_index
fields.description: 0-based index into that compound's sources list.

fields.name: source_text
fields.description: The free-text citation, resolved from sources[source_index].

fields.name: doi
fields.description: DOI of the cited work.

fields.name: resolved
fields.description: Resolution confidence, e.g. high.

fields.name: verified_title
fields.description: Title as returned by the resolver.

fields.name: openalex_id
fields.description: OpenAlex work id; blank where unresolved, never guessed.

fields.name: semantic_scholar_id
fields.description: Semantic Scholar paper id; blank where its rate limit blocked lookup.

fields.name: citation_count
fields.description: Citation count reported by OpenAlex; blank if unresolved.

fields.name: oa_url
fields.description: Open-access URL where one exists; blank otherwise.

fields.name: enrichment_source
fields.description: Which scholarly graph(s) supplied the cross-links for this row.

resources.description: Permitted and forbidden claim wordings per cosmetic ingredient (246 rows across 21 compounds).

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Join key; only is_cosmetic compounds appear.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The graded name, denormalized: nonproprietary (INCI/INN), never a trademark.

fields.name: claim_type
fields.description: allowed | forbidden.

fields.name: claim_text
fields.description: The claim wording. forbidden = asserts a physiological/therapeutic action and must not be used.

resources.description: Chemical identifiers with confidence and provenance (85 rows; 64 confident, 21 intentionally blank).

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Join key.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The graded name, denormalized: nonproprietary (INCI/INN), never a trademark.

fields.name: compound_class
fields.description: Compound class.

fields.name: cas
fields.description: CAS registry number; blank where depositors disagree, never guessed.

fields.name: pubchem_cid
fields.description: PubChem Compound ID.

fields.name: inchikey
fields.description: InChIKey - the best cross-database join key.

fields.name: inchi
fields.description: Full InChI string.

fields.name: smiles
fields.description: Canonical SMILES; only high-confidence SMILES are rendered as images.

fields.name: unii
fields.description: FDA UNII; blank if ambiguous.

fields.name: chembl_id
fields.description: ChEMBL id where available.

fields.name: drugbank_id
fields.description: DrugBank id where available.

fields.name: identifier_source
fields.description: Provenance of the identifier match.

fields.name: identifier_confidence
fields.description: high | medium | low | none.

fields.name: entity_note
fields.description: Set when the resolved record is a real but distinct entity from the register compound (e.g. GHK-Cu resolves to the free peptide ligand, not the copper complex).

resources.description: Catalogue of the image layer that lives in the source repository: one row per compound with alt text, licence, provenance, and an explicit reason where no image exists. The image files themselves are not part of this mirror.
